description_long: This is a stylized wooden shelving unit with a fantasy or medieval design, featuring three open shelves framed by thick, angular side panels. The top of the unit is adorned with a decorative, carved crest, and the structure is reinforced with visible metal rivets along the front and sides. The wood grain texture is prominent, giving the piece a rustic and robust appearance. The back of the unit is solid and unadorned, while the sides are flat with additional rivet detailing. The shelves are open and spacious, suitable for storing or displaying various items. The overall construction suggests durability and a handcrafted aesthetic, making it suitable for urban environments such as themed parks, outdoor markets, or decorative public spaces.
description: A stylized, riveted wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a decorative carved top, featuring a rustic, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, decorative top crest, and metal rivets along the frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat wooden panel with rows of metal rivets and the thickness of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid, unadorned wooden back panel and the angular top design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with visible rivets and wood grain texture.
